topic: 最佳功率负荷在抗阻训练中的干预效果

pico.population: athletes healthy adults physically active individuals
pico.intervention_or_exposure: optimal power load optimum power load power load force-velocity profile
pico.comparator: traditional strength training high load low load moderate load
pico.outcomes: power output muscle power strength hypertrophy athletic performance speed vertical jump
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: ((optimal power load[Title/Abstract] OR optimum power load[Title/Abstract] OR force-velocity profile[Title/Abstract] OR power load[Title/Abstract]) AND (resistance training[Title/Abstract] OR strength training[Title/Abstract] OR weight training[Title/Abstract]) AND (intervention[Title/Abstract] OR effect[Title/Abstract] OR adaptation[Title/Abstract] OR performance[Title/Abstract] OR power output[Title/Abstract] OR muscle power[Title/Abstract])) NOT (animal[Title/Abstract] OR rat[Title/Abstract] OR mouse[Title/Abstract] OR cell[Title/Abstract] OR in vitro[Title/Abstract])
